fields.name: autoConfigureRemote
fields.label: Auto-configure remote Ranger/Atlas
fields.help: When enabled, KDPS creates the Ranger repositories/policies, Atlas federation, and TagSync on the external cluster during deploy. Disable to configure those components yourself — KDPS then skips the pushes, shows the required manual steps in the deploy log, and offers a Preflight check to verify your setup. Property resolution (reads) is unaffected either way.
